text: How often do you choose nutritious snacks (fruits, nuts, yogurt) during study sessions?
How frequently do you experience an energy crash or sudden fatigue in the afternoon?
How often do you consume ultra-processed snacks (chips, candy, fast food) while studying?
How often do snacks noticeably help you stay focused and mentally sharp?
How often do you feel sluggish or drowsy shortly after eating a snack?
How often do you plan your snacks in advance to support your study schedule?
How often do you consume high-sugar drinks (sodas, energy drinks) during study sessions?
How often do you feel mentally alert and clear-headed after eating?
How often do you skip snacks or meals and then feel too tired to study effectively?
How often do your overall eating habits support stable, consistent energy throughout the day?
How often do you feel physically tired even after eating a full meal or snack?
How often do you pick snacks purely out of convenience, without thinking about their nutritional value?
How often do your snacking habits noticeably affect your academic productivity?
How often do you struggle to concentrate specifically because you feel low on energy?
How often do you feel genuinely energized and motivated after eating a snack during study time?
